name: Crockpot Corn Stuffed Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Have the butcher cut a pocket or horizontal slit in the side of each pork chop, forming a pocket for stuffing.
2. Mix the undrained corn, bread crumbs, onion, pepper, salt, and sage together.
3. Spoon the corn mixture into the slits of each pork chop.
4. Close the pockets by securing them with toothpicks or small skewers.
5. Place the stuffed pork chops on a metal rack or trivet in the crockpot.
6. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
7. Serve especially good with fruit salad and lemon-buttered broccoli.
Makes 5 to 6 servings...
